hero.title: Steel Pipes & Plates
hero.description: Empowering Industry · Driving Quality Growth — Your Trusted Steel Pipe & Plate Supply Chain Partner.

products.title: Steel Pipe & Plate & Coil Supply Chain Solutions
products.description: Providing steel pipes, plates, steel coil and bulk material supply with integrated supply chain supervision warehouses, helping global steel enterprises operate efficiently.

galvanizedSteel.title: Steel Pipes
galvanizedSteel.description: Full range including galvanized pipes, ERW pipes, SSAW pipes, meeting diverse needs for fluid transportation, oil & gas pipelines, and construction structures.

steelBillets.title: Steel Plates
steelBillets.description: Including hot-rolled plates, cold-rolled plates, galvanized plates, etc., with excellent quality for various engineering projects.

prePaintedSteel.title: Steel Billets
prePaintedSteel.description: High-quality continuous cast steel billets meeting international standards, providing reliable raw material guarantee for steel processing.

supplyChain.title: Supply Chain Services
supplyChain.description: Project main material supply, bulk material trade, and supply chain supervision warehouses, offering one-stop solutions for global steel enterprises.

giPipeRound.title: Galvanized Round Pipe
giPipeRound.description: Hot-dip galvanized round pipe with smooth surface, uniform zinc layer, and excellent corrosion resistance.

seamlessPipe.title: Seamless Steel Pipe
seamlessPipe.description: Seamless steel pipe with no weld seam, strong pressure bearing capacity, suitable for high-pressure and high-temperature environments.

giCoil.title: Galvanized Coil
giCoil.description: Hot-dip galvanized steel coil with strong zinc layer adhesion and excellent anti-corrosion performance.

ppgiCoil.title: Color Coated Coil (PPGI)
ppgiCoil.description: Pre-painted color steel coil with rich colors and strong weather resistance.

giRoofing.title: Galvanized Roofing Sheet
giRoofing.description: Galvanized corrugated sheet, lightweight and high strength, waterproof and anti-corrosion.

steelSection.title: U-Channel/H-Beam/Angle Steel
steelSection.description: U-channel steel, H-beam, equal angle steel with excellent material quality.

hrCoil.title: Hot Rolled Coil
hrCoil.description: Hot rolled steel coil with oxide scale surface, suitable for cold rolling raw material, structural pipe and welded pipe processing.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Luxi (Liaocheng) Supply Chain Management Co., Ltd.
about.description: Luxi (Liaocheng) Supply Chain Management Co., Ltd. was established in Liaocheng, Shandong Province. Relying on the local deep foundation of the steel pipe and steel plate industry, we focus on creating value in the industrial chain. The company specializes in steel pipe and plate supply and bulk material trade services, equipped with supply chain supervision warehouses, providing efficient and reliable supply chain solutions to global steel enterprises and promoting high-quality industry development.

company.description: Luxi (Liaocheng) Supply Chain Management Co., Ltd. is a professional enterprise specializing in steel pipe and plate supply chain services. Headquartered in Liaocheng, Shandong Province, we have established a comprehensive integrated service system covering procurement, warehousing, logistics, and sales.

items: Galvanized pipes, ERW pipes, SSAW pipes

gi-pipe-round.name: Galvanized Round Pipe
gi-pipe-round.desc: Hot-dip galvanized round pipe with smooth surface, uniform zinc layer and excellent corrosion resistance, widely used in construction, municipal and agricultural fields.

gi-pipe-square.name: Galvanized Square Pipe
gi-pipe-square.desc: Hot-dip galvanized square pipe with high strength and good toughness, suitable for steel structures, machinery manufacturing and furniture production.

erw-pipe.name: ERW Steel Pipe
erw-pipe.desc: High-frequency electric resistance welded pipe with high weld quality and good dimensional accuracy, suitable for fluid transportation and structural support.

seamless-pipe.name: Seamless Steel Pipe
seamless-pipe.desc: Seamless steel pipe without weld seam, strong pressure-bearing capacity, suitable for high-pressure, high-temperature and harsh working conditions.

square-tube.name: Square/Rectangular Tube
square-tube.desc: Black annealed/galvanized square and rectangular tubes with complete specifications and custom cutting, widely used in building structures and machinery manufacturing.

steel-section.name: U-Channel/H-Beam/Angle Steel
steel-section.desc: U-channel, H-beam and equal angle steel with excellent material quality, suitable for large building structures and bridge engineering.

hr-coil.name: Hot Rolled Coil
hr-coil.desc: Hot rolled steel coil with oxide scale surface, high strength and good plasticity, suitable for cold rolling raw material, structural pipe and welded pipe processing.

gi-coil.name: Galvanized Steel Coil
gi-coil.desc: Hot-dip galvanized steel coil with strong zinc layer adhesion and good anti-corrosion performance, can be processed by slitting and leveling.

gi-sheet.name: Galvanized Steel Sheet
gi-sheet.desc: Hot-dip galvanized steel sheet with good surface quality and excellent processing performance, suitable for home appliances, automotive and construction industries.

gi-roofing.name: Galvanized Roofing Sheet
gi-roofing.desc: Galvanized corrugated sheet (color steel tile) with light weight, high strength, waterproof and anti-corrosion, widely used for factory and warehouse roofs.

ppgi-coil.name: PPGI Coil
ppgi-coil.desc: Pre-painted galvanized steel coil (PPGI) with rich colors and strong weather resistance, suitable for building decoration and home appliance shells.

ppgi-roofing.name: PPGI Roofing Sheet
ppgi-roofing.desc: Pre-painted corrugated sheet with beautiful appearance, durability, heat insulation and sound insulation, suitable for villas, factories and prefabricated houses.
